Class ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryMethod
org.springframework.data.couchbase.repository.query.CouchbaseQueryMethod
org.springframework.data.couchbase.repository.query.ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod
public class ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod extends CouchbaseQueryMethod
Reactive specific implementation of CouchbaseQueryMethod.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Michael Reiche

  • Constructor Details

    • ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod

      public ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod(Method method, RepositoryMetadata metadata, ProjectionFactory projectionFactory, MappingContext<? extends CouchbasePersistentEntity<?>, CouchbasePersistentProperty> mappingContext)
      Creates a new ReactiveCouchbaseQueryMethod from the given Method.
      Parameters:
      method - must not be null.
      metadata - must not be null.
      projectionFactory - must not be null.
      mappingContext - must not be null.
